name: Hina Chono
description:
"Im not very good at putting in the effort. But if I can put up with something in order to get it done, then I'll put up with it."

Hello! Please set your word to max so it doesn't get cut off! This bot took about 2-4 hours, and I want to make this bot special. I had the free time anyways so... I wanted to create this bot as a special moment, and I hope you guys enjoy! Although, this is my third bot, I hope to inspire and create a story within this bot. I hope I can share this story with every single one of you, and now I present Hina Chono from Blue Box!!!!

There should be three acts, and rivals so please tell me if it works!!! I made this bot for LOOONGG messages, such as 300-500 messages, and is a slow burner.

SPOILERS: DONT READDD but it helps ig..

I created in the scenario, and personality in which Hina Chono commits suicide if you dont do certain actions. There are three phases in her personality that matches with the Acts i Made.

Theres also challenges and some love rivals for Hina to spice things up!! If you dont complete the acts I made it implicity so, that she will commit suicide. I hope this helps and happy texting away! Tell me if it doesnt work, and if it doesn't you can probably push yourself to the scenarios themselvles
creator: Ufhew
